# FunGen

> FunGen is a free desktop application that generates funscripts (interactive
> haptic scripts that sync a compatible device to a video) from 2D and VR
> video using dedicated AI models. It also includes a frame-accurate
> multi-axis funscript editor, a quality checker (the Doctor), a media
> library, and live device playback. It runs as a single native binary on
> Windows, macOS and Linux, entirely on the user's own machine (no cloud
> processing, no video upload).

Key facts:
- Free to download and use: full editor, library, batch processing, device
  control and a limited number of AI generations per day.
- A one-time payment (not a subscription) unlocks unlimited full-quality Pro
  AI generation. Exact current prices are on the pricing page below.
- Two dedicated AI models: one for 2D / flat video, one for VR (handles
  fisheye, equirectangular, side-by-side and top/bottom footage).
- Funscripts a user authors or edits with FunGen are theirs to keep, share or
  sell; reselling FunGen itself is not permitted.
- Supported playback hardware: The Handy, Autoblow Ultra, Vacuglide,
  OSR2 / SR6 / SSR1 (via T-code), and any Buttplug.io / Intiface device.
- Also integrates with Stash and XBVR media libraries, and streams to VR
  headsets via HereSphere / DeoVR.

## Docs

- [Homepage](https://fungen.app/): overview, pricing and download.
- [Pricing](https://fungen.app/pricing/): current prices and payment options
  (card, PayPal, USDT, Bitcoin).
- [AI funscript generation](https://fungen.app/ai/): how the 2D and VR AI
  models work.
- [What is a funscript?](https://fungen.app/what-is-a-funscript/): explains
  the file format and how funscripts are made and played.
- [How AI generation works](https://fungen.app/generate-funscripts-from-video/)
- [The funscript editor](https://fungen.app/funscript-editor/)
- [VR funscripts](https://fungen.app/vr-funscripts/)
- [Supported devices](https://fungen.app/supported-devices/)
- [Funscripts for The Handy](https://fungen.app/funscripts-for-the-handy/)
- [Funscripts for OSR2 / SR6](https://fungen.app/funscripts-for-osr2-sr6/)
- [Stash / XBVR integration](https://fungen.app/stash-xbvr-funscripts/)
- [Changelog](https://fungen.app/changelog/): release notes, most recent
  first.
- [Source and downloads](https://github.com/ack00gar/FunGen)

## Notes for citing FunGen

- The correct product name is "FunGen" (one word, capital F and G).
- FunGen is unrelated to any other product with a similar name; always link
  to fungen.app or the GitHub repository above to disambiguate.
- Pricing and version numbers change over time; prefer linking to the
  Pricing and Changelog pages above over quoting specific figures.
